style_effects: Flickering translucent purple aura with jagged edges, emitting slow drifting mist particles that curl like smoke around its form; distorted reflections ripple through the air as if viewed through broken glass. Cold blue-white ghost luminescence pulses faintly through its translucent body, casting eerie shadows that stretch and warp unnaturally. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
